tasks.task_goal: Carry six grocery bags from the car to the kitchen in one trip
tasks.expected_outcome: All groceries arrive intact in the kitchen without tearing bags or dropping items
required_tool_attributes: reinforced dual handles for load support
tear-resistant fabric with high-friction exterior
flat semi-rigid bottom insert to stabilize the center of mass
gusseted sides that prevent shifting
unconventional_tools: car trunk organizer with carry handles
collapsible fabric laundry basket with reinforced handles
plastic storage bin with side handles
opposite_tool_attributes: single, non-reinforced handle (or no handles) that stretches or tears under load
slick, tear-prone exterior material with low friction (e.g., thin plastic or satin)
floppy, rounded bottom with non-gusseted, collapsing sides that allow contents to shift

tasks.task_goal: Carry a laptop, charger, and notebook from a desk to a conference room
tasks.expected_outcome: Electronics and documents arrive organized and undamaged at the meeting
required_tool_attributes: padded anti-slip shoulder strap for frictional grip and load distribution
semi-rigid frame panel to support weight
segmented compartments to prevent shifting
sturdy top handle to maintain balance during lifting
unconventional_tools: soft-sided insulated cooler bag with shoulder strap
messenger-style diaper bag
electrician's tool tote with padded shoulder strap
opposite_tool_attributes: slippery, narrow, unpadded strap that slides off the shoulder and creates pressure points
flimsy, fully collapsible body with no semi-rigid support panel
single unpartitioned or open-mesh compartment that allows contents to shift or spill

tasks.task_goal: Carry a hot casserole from the oven to the dining table
tasks.expected_outcome: The casserole reaches the table upright without spills or burns
required_tool_attributes: rigid bottom tray to support the dish weight
zippered insulated lid that secures and stabilizes contents
wide heat-resistant handles with textured grip
non-slip interior surface to reduce sliding
unconventional_tools: insulated grocery cooler tote with rigid base insert
hard-sided picnic cooler (small ice chest)
rectangular cake carrier
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, sagging bottom with no rigid support
open, unfastened, non-insulated top that doesn't secure contents
narrow, heat-conductive, slick handles or no handles

tasks.task_goal: Carry a bundle of firewood from the woodpile to the fireplace
tasks.expected_outcome: Logs are transported indoors cleanly and without dropping pieces
required_tool_attributes: heavy-duty canvas for load support and abrasion resistance
wide wraparound handles that center the load
semi-rigid base to maintain shape and stability
textured fabric to increase friction against logs
unconventional_tools: contractor’s canvas tool tote bag with wraparound webbing handles and a hard bottom insert
large IKEA-style woven polypropylene moving bag (FRAKTA) with wide straps and a semi-rigid base panel
soft-sided pet carrier with wraparound handles and a removable rigid floor
opposite_tool_attributes: thin, non-abrasion-resistant fabric that tears or stretches under load
narrow, non-wraparound or single-point handles that off-center the load
fully limp base with no structure that collapses and won't keep shape

tasks.task_goal: Move a stack of packed boxes from the garage to a moving truck
tasks.expected_outcome: Boxes are transported safely and remain upright without tipping
required_tool_attributes: steel frame rated for the load
wide non-slip toe plate to support and grip boxes
tall handle for controlled leverage and balance
large wheels for stable rolling over thresholds
unconventional_tools: wheelbarrow
rolling trash bin (wheelie bin)
garden utility wagon (kids' pull wagon)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, low-strength (fabric/plastic) frame with no load rating
narrow, smooth, slippery toe contact area or no toe plate at all
tiny hard casters or no wheels that snag on thresholds

tasks.task_goal: Carry newly potted seedlings from the potting bench to the garden bed
tasks.expected_outcome: Seedlings arrive upright with soil undisturbed
required_tool_attributes: rigid plastic tray to prevent flexing under load
raised rim to block lateral movement
textured base to add friction under pots
side finger slots for a balanced grip
unconventional_tools: entryway boot tray (shoe drip tray)
breakfast serving tray with handles and a non‑slip surface
stackable office letter tray (paper inbox)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible or floppy material that sags under load instead of a rigid plastic tray
no rim or outward-sloping edges that fail to block lateral movement
smooth, glossy base that reduces friction and lets pots slide

tasks.task_goal: Carry a kayak from the car to the shoreline
tasks.expected_outcome: The kayak reaches the water without scraping and with the carrier maintaining balance
required_tool_attributes: adjustable strap to position the center of mass under the shoulder
padded shoulder pad for load distribution
locking attachment loops that secure to kayak handles
non-slip webbing to prevent sliding during movement
unconventional_tools: Cam-buckle roof-rack tie-down strap with carabiner ends used as a shoulder sling
Detachable duffel/laptop bag shoulder strap with padded, non-slip shoulder pad and swivel clips
Hands-free running dog leash with adjustable length and locking carabiner
opposite_tool_attributes: fixed-length, non-adjustable strap that cannot position the center of mass under the shoulder
unpadded, narrow shoulder contact surface that creates pressure points
smooth, slippery or elastic webbing that slides or stretches during movement
impossible_tools: elastic bungee cord with open hooks

tasks.task_goal: Carry a large sheet of glass from the workshop rack to a cutting table
tasks.expected_outcome: The glass panel is transported flat without slipping or chipping
required_tool_attributes: high-friction rubber suction pads for grip
lock-down levers to maintain vacuum
rigid crossbar handle for balanced lifting
rated hardware for the panel’s weight
unconventional_tools: suction shower grab bar (bathroom safety handle with locking levers)
heavy-duty toilet plunger
car windshield suction phone/GPS mount with locking lever
opposite_tool_attributes: low-friction, non-sealing pads (hard plastic or porous foam) that cannot create or hold suction
no lock-down mechanism or valves that slowly bleed air, releasing the vacuum
flexible strap/rope handle instead of a rigid crossbar, causing twist and imbalance
impossible_tools: magnetic plate lifter/hoist (magnets do not work on glass)
plain rope sling or webbing strap with no clamps or rigid spreader bar
Velcro strap or hook-and-loop tape (no mating surface on glass; no secure grip)
kitchen sponge or foam block (compressible and porous; cannot form/hold suction or bear weight)

tasks.task_goal: Carry two full paint cans up a flight of stairs to a work area
tasks.expected_outcome: Paint cans reach the work area without swinging excessively or spilling
required_tool_attributes: steel hook that securely engages can bails
centered handle for balanced load support
rubberized grip to increase friction in hand
adequate load rating for full cans
unconventional_tools: ratchet tie-down strap with S-hooks
bicycle U-lock
heavy-duty wire coat hanger (bent into dual hooks)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible or shallow, non-locking hooks (or no hooks) that cannot securely engage can bails
off-center or shifting handle that prevents balanced load support
inadequate load rating or brittle materials that fail under the weight of full cans

tasks.task_goal: Deliver four coffees from a cafe counter to a coworker’s desk
tasks.expected_outcome: All cups arrive upright without tipping or sloshing
required_tool_attributes: molded cup wells that centralize each cup’s mass
rigid paperboard to resist bending
perimeter lip to block lateral movement
finger cutouts for a secure carry grip
unconventional_tools: 6-cup metal muffin tin
cardboard 4-bottle beer/wine carrier
plastic nursery plant 4-pack carrier
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, slippery surface with no molded cup wells
limp, flexible material that sags under load
smooth edges without a perimeter lip or finger cutouts

tasks.task_goal: Carry 10 liters of water from a campground spigot to a tent site
tasks.expected_outcome: Water arrives at the campsite without leaking or excessive slosh
required_tool_attributes: molded top and side handles for controlled lifting
rigid HDPE walls to support liquid weight
screw cap with gasket to seal and stabilize contents
rectangular form that keeps mass close to the body
unconventional_tools: Empty rectangular cat litter jug with screw cap
Rinsed laundry detergent bottle or jug
5-gallon bucket fitted with a gamma-seal screw lid
opposite_tool_attributes: no handles or slippery exterior, preventing controlled lifting
soft, collapsible, or porous walls that deform or leak under load
open top or non-gasketed lid that cannot be sealed against slosh or spills

tasks.task_goal: Carry a cat safely from home to the veterinarian
tasks.expected_outcome: The pet arrives secure and calm, with the carrier remaining level
required_tool_attributes: rigid ventilated shell to support weight
locking door and latches to prevent shifting or escape
centered top handle and optional shoulder strap
non-slip interior mat to stabilize the animal
unconventional_tools: wicker picnic basket with hinged lid and buckle closures
perforated plastic file storage crate with snap-on lid and top handle
ventilated produce/milk crate with clip-on lid and carry handles
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, collapsible, non-ventilated body that sags under weight
unsecured opening with no locking door or latches; gaps that allow escape
no centered handle or strap; slick interior without a non-slip mat

tasks.task_goal: Transport a decorated cake from the kitchen to a birthday party venue
tasks.expected_outcome: The cake arrives intact with decorations undisturbed
required_tool_attributes: rigid base plate that supports cake weight
locking lid and side latches to prevent movement
top handle centered over the load for balance
non-slip base surface to hold the cake board
unconventional_tools: hard-sided pet carrier
large toolbox or tackle box with latching lid
small hard-sided cooler with a top handle (e.g., Igloo Playmate)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, sagging base that bends under the cake's weight
no lid or non-locking cover that allows the cake to shift
off-center side handle or shoulder strap that tilts the load

tasks.task_goal: Carry a car battery from the parts counter to a vehicle in the parking lot
tasks.expected_outcome: Battery is moved without slipping, tilting, or straining the carrier
required_tool_attributes: acid-resistant strap with textured underside for frictional grip
clamp or cam mechanism that secures under battery lips
central rigid handle to keep the load balanced
sufficient load rating for heavy batteries
unconventional_tools: Heavy-duty ratchet tie-down strap with S-hooks and a short pipe as a central handle
5-gallon HDPE bucket with metal bail (battery placed inside)
Plastic milk crate with hand holes and a rubber mat liner
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, non-textured, acid-absorbent strap material that degrades on acid contact
no under-lip securing mechanism (relies only on friction, magnets, or suction)
no central rigid handle; floppy/off-center flexible grip with low load rating
impossible_tools: magnetic lifting clamp (battery case is non-ferrous plastic)

tasks.task_goal: Carry a 4×8 sheet of plywood from a stack to a table saw
tasks.expected_outcome: The sheet is transported on edge without dragging or losing control
required_tool_attributes: rubber-lined jaw that grips the panel edge via friction
angled design to position the center of mass beneath the handle
steel frame to resist bending under load
ergonomic handle for controlled carry
unconventional_tools: large F-style bar clamp with soft jaw pads used as a carry handle
heavy-duty C-clamp with a rubber or leather pad on the contact face
wooden handscrew clamp tightened on the sheet edge as a temporary handle
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, unlined jaws that slide off the panel edge with low friction
straight or inverted geometry that places the panel’s center of mass above/away from the handle (top‑heavy)
flexible or brittle frame (e.g., thin plastic) that bends or fails under load
impossible_tools: glass suction cup lifter (requires airtight, non-porous surface; plywood is porous)
rope (no rigid, gripping jaw or controlled load alignment)
inflatable pool noodle (compressible, no structure or gripping surface)

tasks.task_goal: Move a framed painting from the storage room to a gallery wall
tasks.expected_outcome: The artwork arrives without frame stress, slipping, or surface contact damage
required_tool_attributes: soft, non-abrasive straps with slip-resistant sleeves
adjustable length to balance the artwork’s center of mass
padded handles to distribute load
corner protectors to stabilize and support the frame
unconventional_tools: Yoga mat straps + foam pipe insulation corner sleeves + silicone jar grippers + oven mitt handles
Cotton bedsheet sling + non-slip drawer liner + quartered pool noodle corner protectors + rolled towel handles
Fabric luggage straps + repurposed backpack shoulder pad cushions + rubber shelf liner wraps + cardboard corner protectors
opposite_tool_attributes: abrasive, slick straps without slip-resistant sleeves
fixed-length, non-adjustable ties that can’t balance the load
hard, unpadded clamps or bare metal hooks contacting the frame corners

tasks.task_goal: Clear dirty dishes from a dining table to the kitchen sink
tasks.expected_outcome: Plates, glasses, and cutlery are transported together without breakage
required_tool_attributes: rigid reinforced walls for load support
molded side handles for a secure grip
textured interior to reduce sliding
flat sturdy bottom to keep the load level
unconventional_tools: large plastic storage tote (e.g., Rubbermaid bin)
plastic laundry basket
large roasting pan
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, collapsible walls without reinforcement
no side handles or a slick, hard-to-grip exterior
rounded or perforated bottom that can’t keep the load level

tasks.task_goal: Carry ice from the freezer to a home bar for a party
tasks.expected_outcome: Ice is delivered without spilling or dropping the container
required_tool_attributes: thick rigid walls to support the mass of ice
bail handle with textured grip for friction and control
fitted lid to limit slosh and spillage
flat base for stable setting down
unconventional_tools: New 5-gallon paint bucket with snap-on lid and metal bail handle
Insulated beverage cooler/jug with locking lid and carry handle
Pressure cooker pot with locking lid and handles
opposite_tool_attributes: thin, flexible or porous walls that sag, tear, or leak under the weight of ice
no handle or a slick cord/strap without texture, offering little grip or control
open top or loose, non-fitted lid; rounded or pointed base that cannot stand stably

tasks.task_goal: Transport labeled blood samples from a clinic room to the lab
tasks.expected_outcome: Specimens arrive upright, sealed, and within containment requirements
required_tool_attributes: impact-resistant rigid shell for load support
gasketed locking lid to prevent leaks
integrated top handle for balanced carrying
internal rack or foam to keep tubes upright and stable
unconventional_tools: Waterproof ammo can with rubber gasket and top handle
Hard camera equipment case with pick-and-pluck foam
Waterproof marine tackle/dry box with locking lid and carry handle
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, collapsible shell that lacks impact resistance and load support
open or non-sealing lid without a gasketed lock, allowing leaks and spills
bare interior with no rack or foam to keep tubes upright and stable

tasks.task_goal: Carry a guitar from home to a rehearsal space
tasks.expected_outcome: The instrument arrives protected and the case remains closed and balanced during transport
required_tool_attributes: hard shell that supports and protects the load
form-fit padded interior to immobilize the guitar
centered handle for balanced lifting
secure metal latches to keep the case closed
unconventional_tools: hard rifle/long gun case with pick-and-pluck foam
golf travel hard case
hard ski/snowboard travel case
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, collapsible exterior with no rigid support
loose, unpadded interior that lets the guitar shift around
no handle or off-center handle; weak or no closure that can open under load
